title: Events
content: Events Events Organized in 2025-26 Raspberry Pi Workshop – Learn, Build, Lead! : 23rd August 2025 Report on Anti-Ragging Day/Week Observance – ECE Department, JUIT: 12th Aug. 2025 Events Organized in 2024-25 Alumni Interaction cum Motivational Talk on 13-08-2024.
